storyboard.content: I've been having this tight, squeezing pain in my chest that comes and goes.
The pain spreads to my left arm and jaw sometimes.
I get really short of breath and sweaty when it happens.
It started about 2 weeks ago and has been getting more frequent and intense in the last 3 days.
The pain hits about a 7 out of 10 and each episode lasts 5 to 10 minutes.
It used to happen when I was climbing stairs or walking fast, but now even carrying groceries sets it off.
I'm a 58-year-old man. I'm overweight and I smoke.
